inputs.label: Hot Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid entering the heat exchanger.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of hot fluid entering the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciye giren sıcak akışkanın sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des heißen Fluids beim Eintritt in den Wärmetauscher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide chaud entrant dans l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del fluido caliente que entra al intercambiador de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المائع الساخن الداخل إلى المبادل الحراري.

inputs.label: Hot Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid leaving the heat exchanger.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of hot fluid leaving the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciden çıkan sıcak akışkanın sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des heißen Fluids beim Austritt aus dem Wärmetauscher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide chaud sortant de l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del fluido caliente que sale del intercambiador de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المائع الساخن الخارج من المبادل الحراري.

inputs.label: Cold Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid entering the heat exchanger.

label_i18n.es: Temperatura de entrada del fluido frío

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of cold fluid entering the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciye giren soğuk akışkanın sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des kalten Fluids beim Eintritt in den Wärmetauscher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide froid entrant dans l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del fluido frío que ingresa al intercambiador de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المائع البارد الداخل إلى المبادل الحراري.

inputs.label: Cold Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid leaving the heat exchanger.

label_i18n.es: Temperatura de salida del fluido frío

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of cold fluid leaving the heat exchanger.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştiriciden çıkan soğuk akışkanın sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur des kalten Fluids beim Austritt aus dem Wärmetauscher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du fluide froid sortant de l'échangeur de chaleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del fluido frío que sale del intercambiador de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المائع البارد الخارج من المبادل الحراري.

inputs.label: Flow Arrangement (1=Counterflow, 2=Parallel)
inputs.businessContext: Heat exchanger flow configuration. Use 1 for counterflow, 2 for parallel flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Heat exchanger flow configuration. Use 1 for counterflow, 2 for parallel flow.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı değiştirici akış konfigürasyonu. Ters akış için 1, paralel akış için 2 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Strömungskonfiguration des Wärmetauschers. Verwenden Sie 1 für Gegenstrom, 2 für Parallelstrom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Configuration du flux de l'échangeur de chaleur. Utilisez 1 pour contre-courant, 2 pour flux parallèle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Configuración del flujo del intercambiador de calor. Use 1 para contracorriente, 2 para flujo paralelo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكوين تدفق المبادل الحراري. استخدم 1 للتيار المعاكس، 2 للتيار المتوازي.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
